TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Dennis Bell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1951, byacing te 6 ru 2 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Ohio, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 196 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 84 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1973 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu ew York Knicks. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players == qnxan hetay nya ==
S.PHON: *ennis~ɕ βell s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru * rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa oħio, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu ew jork kniʦ~ʨks~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ == qnxan ħetaj nja ==
S.FORM: Dennis Bell sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1951, byacing te 6 ru 2 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Ohio, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 196 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 84 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1973 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu ew York Knicks. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players == qnxan hetay nya ==
S.PHON: *ennis~ɕ βell s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru * rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa oħio, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu ew jork kniʦ~ʨks~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ == qnxan ħetaj nja ==
